content.tagline: Precision Cuts. Custom Fabrication. Built for the Sea.
content.about:
Advanced Waterjet Solutions is Fort Lauderdale's premier provider of precision waterjet and laser cutting services for the marine industry and beyond. Located at 3309 SW 11th Ave in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, we bring cutting-edge technology and over 20 years of expertise to every custom metal fabrication project we take on. Whether you're a boat builder in Broward County or a yacht owner docked in Miami, we deliver the kind of precision that serious marine work demands.

Our facility is equipped to handle complex welding and fabrication projects from the ground up. We work with a wide range of metals and alloys — cutting, shaping, and joining components to exact specifications using both waterjet and laser cutting technology alongside skilled structural and custom welding. From custom marine hardware and structural frames to intricate decorative metalwork, our fabrication capabilities are built around accuracy, repeatability, and fast turnaround times that keep your project on schedule.

We serve boat builders, yacht manufacturers, marine repair shops, and vessel owners throughout South Florida who need reliable, high-quality metalwork done right the first time. Our team understands the demanding environment that marine components face — saltwater corrosion, structural stress, and the need for tight tolerances — and we fabricate accordingly. From Fort Lauderdale and Miami to Palm Beach and the surrounding communities, Advanced Waterjet Solutions is the shop South Florida's marine industry turns to when precision and craftsmanship matter.
content.seoTitle: Advanced Waterjet Solutions | Welding & Fabrication Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom welding & fabrication for marine vessels in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida with precision metalwork. Call Advanced Waterjet Solutions today.
seoKeywords: custom metal fabrication Fort Lauderdale FL

serviceDescriptions.Welding & Fabrication: Advanced Waterjet Solutions provides precision welding and custom metal fabrication for marine vessels, combining structural welding expertise with waterjet and laser cutting technology to produce components built to exact specifications. From custom marine hardware and structural frames to decorative metalwork and replacement parts, every fabricated piece is built to withstand the rigors of marine environments. Fast turnaround times and over 20 years of hands-on fabrication experience ensure your project is done right and on schedule.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Fort Lauderdale, FL, Advanced Waterjet Solutions serves boat owners and marine businesses throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom stainless steel marine hardware fabricated to vessel specifications
Structural frame welding and repair for commercial and recreational boats
Precision waterjet-cut deck plates, hatches, and marine panels
Custom aluminum fabrication for boat railings, towers, and arches
Replacement metal components cut and welded to OEM tolerances
Decorative and functional metalwork for yacht interiors and exteriors
Fabrication of engine mounts, brackets, and custom mechanical supports
